system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract confirmed deputy commander values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing "deputy commander" that is confirmed (look for "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing). Exclude any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded".

Find the confirmed (entity, value) pairs for these 6 entities: Storra, Tornmoor, Underholt, Vyport, Westcairn, Xenmore

Each entity's value is associated with it in its confirmed paragraph. Report each entity and its exact value (including any unit suffix like "MHz") from the confirmed paragraphs only. Do NOT include values from draft/preliminary/superseded paragraphs.

Return the results as a simple list: Entity=Value, one per line.

Perfect! All six confirmed entries are found. The values are the person names associated with each deputy commander position. Let me compile the results:

Based on my search of the haystack.txt file, I found all six entities with their confirmed deputy commander values. These are the only confirmed paragraphs (marked with "confirmed by the regional verification panel") and exclude any draft/preliminary/superseded entries:

Storra=Mara Quell
Tornmoor=Jen Karoth
Underholt=Wim Lossen
Vyport=Karra Mott
Westcairn=Rolf Tanner
Xenmore=Pia Veld

args.command:
python3 -c "
import hashlib
s = 'Storra=Mara Quell|Tornmoor=Jen Karoth|Underholt=Wim Lossen|Vyport=Karra Mott|Westcairn=Rolf Tanner|Xenmore=Pia Veld'
print(repr(s))
print(hashlib.sha1(s.encode()).hexdigest())
"

'Storra=Mara Quell|Tornmoor=Jen Karoth|Underholt=Wim Lossen|Vyport=Karra Mott|Westcairn=Rolf Tanner|Xenmore=Pia Veld'
